identity.name: Nexus Cloud
identity.description: A high-performance 3D word cloud generator with a futuristic, cinematic interface.

layout.grid_system: Use a Z-layered approach. Layer 0 is the 3D Canvas. Layer 10 is the UI Overlay.

Input.style: bg-black/50 border-b-2 border-white/20 focus:border-cyan-400 text-white placeholder-white/30 font-mono h-12 w-full transition-all duration-300 outline-none

Button.primary: bg-cyan-500/10 hover:bg-cyan-500/20 text-cyan-400 border border-cyan-500/50 hover:border-cyan-400 px-6 py-2 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold text-sm transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(0,243,255,0.1)] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,243,255,0.4)]
Button.secondary: bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-white border border-white/10 px-4 py-2 text-sm transition-all

3d_scene.fog: Use explicit fog to fade distant words: <fog attach='fog' args={['#050505', 0, 80]} />
3d_scene.lighting: Ambient light (0.5) + Point Lights (Cyan/Purple) to create depth.
3d_scene.word_behavior: Words should face the camera (Billboard). Hovering a word should scale it up (1.5x) and change color to Neon Cyan.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALLATION: Run `yarn add three @types/three @react-three/fiber @react-three/drei framer-motion lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge`.
2. FONT SETUP: Import the Google Fonts in `index.css` or `index.html` immediately.
3. STRUCTURE: Create a folder `frontend/src/components/canvas` for 3D components and `frontend/src/components/ui` for HUD elements.
4. LAYOUT: The `<Canvas>` must be `fixed inset-0 -z-10` to cover the full screen. The UI elements (Input, Title, Error) must be absolute positioned on top.
5. ERROR HANDLING: If the API fails, show a 'SYSTEM FAILURE' glitch effect overlay, not a boring toast.
6. LOADING: Use a 'Decrypting...' text animation or a 3D spinner while fetching data.
7. WORD CLOUD LOGIC: The backend returns {text, value}. In frontend, map these to 3D positions. Use a spherical distribution or a random cloud within a bounds box.
8. DO NOT use standard shadcn/ui styles. Override them with the Cyber-Void styles defined in `visual_enhancers`.
9. SAMPLE DATA: When the app loads, if no URL is entered, render a 'demo' cloud with words like [React, ThreeJS, Fiber, Creative, Code, Future, Data, Visual].
10. RESPONSIVE: On mobile, reduce the number of words and increase the camera distance.
universal_guidelines: Use 'Orbitron' for all headings to give that sci-fi look.
Never use pure white backgrounds. Always dark.
All interactive elements must have a hover state that involves a glow or color shift.
Use 'framer-motion' for UI entrances (fade in + slide up).
Ensure the 3D scene is performant. Use `instancedMesh` if rendering > 1000 words (unlikely here, but good practice). For < 100 words, individual <Text> components are fine.
